calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-16-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant To Produce Documents
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Hadiaris, Esq., 415-694-0052, appearing for 7.83 HZ, Plaintiff and moving party.

Paul Utrecht, Esq., 415-357-0600, appearing for 3884 Stoneridge, Defendant and opposing party.

ARGUED. Mr. Hadiaris requested that the tentative ruling be modified so that the monetary sanctions state precisely who they are against. Mr. Utrecht explained that there are no billing records and that is why bills were never sent.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF 7.83 HZ, LLC'S Motion To Compel Defendant To Produce Documents is GRANTED. All responsive documents shall be produced by 5:00 p.m. February 20, 2019. Sanctions granted in the amount of $3,270 to be paid no later than February 25, 2019. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
